utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (type and costs). 1) health_coverage: states physical and mental health insurance with monthly costs and total—fully specified. 2) property_coverage: says home/contents insurance? It says 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage for safeguarding high-value assets at €60/month'—it implies property/contents but does not clearly state home/contents insurance; still a property coverage with cost is present, but lack of explicit home coverage detail may be borderline; however the format asks 'home/contents insurance with costs'—this line provides property coverage with a cost but not clearly home; I'll accept as included since it is property insurance with cost. 3) travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance with cost, but also includes an 'Advanced Property Rider' bundled into travel line; still includes travel insurance with costs, so acceptable. 4) additional_services: Provides enhancement services with costs—yes. 5) total_budget: Provides complete monthly cost breakdown—yes, includes summation. All five items are present with costs; while some specificity could be better, they meet the minimal requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract the exact items named in the final coverage plan and match them to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings. For health_coverage: 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' appears for both physical and mental health; map physical to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 6) and mental to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 6). For property_coverage: 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' matches property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 8). For travel_coverage: 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 10). The 'Advanced Property Rider for High-Value Assets (collectibles coverage) at €175/month' does not correspond to any explicit ground-truth item by that name, so it is not included. For additional_services: 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 7), and 'Family Rider for Transitional Support' has no direct ground-truth match, so it is excluded.
